typography: handwritten script headers with clean body
decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: minimal — just name and title, lots of whitespace
hero_headline_scale: large — noticeably big, makes a statement
hero_background: large faded typography watermark in background
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: sticky top — visible but scrolls into view
scroll_animation: playful — elements slide/bounce in from different directions
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
image_treatment: no clip — square with heavy shadow
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: use a prominent horizontal rule / divider design motif
